description: Add ConversationTypeAnnounce to types. Create announce/ package with: (1) master key + posting key generation (both Ed25519), (2) AnnounceChannelMeta struct (name, conv_id, owner_pk, master_pk), (3) transport-layer signature for envelope auth (sign/verify envelope_b64 with posting key so worker can gate writes), (4) master key operations: sign channel create/delete/rotate requests.
title: Announce channel: core types and key generation
